judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all three required rubric points: it explains that `group` organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, search metadata, and AGENTS.md grouping; it correctly characterizes /llms-full.txt as the monolithic all-docs file that is not sharded per group; and it names well more than two valid optional fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor). Some extra fields like `deprecatedReason` and `availableIn` may be invented, but the rubric only penalizes if fewer than two valid fields are listed, which is not the case here.
